fieldGroups.label: Medical Necessity And Homebound
fieldGroups.description: Narratives and evidence for home health need and homebound status.

fieldGroups.label: Diagnosis And Coding
fieldGroups.description: Diagnosis evidence, coding-sensitive rows, and escalation flags.

fieldGroups.label: Medications, Allergies, And Special Treatments
fieldGroups.description: Medication safety, allergies, injectables, and O0110 special treatments.

fieldGroups.label: Functional And Therapy Status
fieldGroups.description: GG/M functional scoring, therapy need, discipline frequency, and goals.

fieldGroups.label: Symptom And Body System Review
fieldGroups.description: Body-system review sections that QA checks for consistency and completeness.

fieldGroups.label: Risk And Safety Assessments
fieldGroups.description: Fall, wound, hospitalization, and safety-related risk tools.

fieldGroups.label: Care Plan And Coordination
fieldGroups.description: Plan-of-care orders, patient summary, skilled interventions, and care plan content.

fieldGroups.label: Supplementals And History
fieldGroups.description: Past medical history, caregiver support, living situation, immunizations, and supplementals.

fieldGroups.label: Low Priority Admin Reference
fieldGroups.description: Identity, agency, physician, and demographic reference values that should not dominate QA.

sourceHighlights.summary: The patient needs home health for nursing and physical therapy.

sourceHighlights.summary: The patient's prior level of function is not specified in the referral documents.

sourceHighlights.title: Wound history
sourceHighlights.summary: The patient has a history of an unspecified open wound of an unspecified finger with damage to the nail.

sourceHighlights.title: Diet and fluid instructions
sourceHighlights.summary: The patient was instructed to follow a low sodium diet, exercise, and check blood pressure regularly.

sourceHighlights.title: PMH, immunizations, and DM status
sourceHighlights.summary: The patient has a history of essential hypertension, type 2 diabetes mellitus with hyperosmolarity without nonketotic hyperglycemia, and mixed hyperlipidemia.

sourceHighlights.title: Diagnoses and possible coding support references
sourceHighlights.summary: The patient has a history of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, chronic depression, low back pain, and chronic insomnia.

draftNarratives.label: Homebound Reason
draftNarratives.draft: The patient is homebound due to chronic conditions and requires home health for nursing and physical therapy.

draftNarratives.label: Medical Necessity
draftNarratives.draft: The patient needs home health for nursing and physical therapy due to chronic conditions.

draftNarratives.label: Patient Summary / Clinical Narrative
draftNarratives.draft: Aurora Briggs, an 83-year-old female, is referred for home health services due to chronic conditions including essential hypertension, type 2 diabetes mellitus with hyperosmolarity without nonketotic hyperglycemia, mixed hyperlipidemia, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, chronic depression, low back pain, and chronic insomnia. The patient requires nursing and physical therapy at home.

draftNarratives.label: Skilled Interventions
draftNarratives.draft: Physical therapy is required for the patient due to chronic conditions.

draftNarratives.label: Plan For Next Visit
draftNarratives.draft: The plan for the next visit includes physical therapy.

draftNarratives.label: Care Plan Problems / Goals / Interventions
draftNarratives.draft: The care plan includes problems such as essential hypertension, type 2 diabetes mellitus with hyperosmolarity without nonketotic hyperglycemia, mixed hyperlipidemia, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, chronic depression, low back pain, and chronic insomnia. Goals include managing these conditions through nursing and physical therapy. Interventions include physical therapy and nursing care at home.

draftNarratives.label: Patient / Caregiver Goals
draftNarratives.draft: The patient and caregiver goals include managing chronic conditions through nursing and physical therapy at home.
